reef._comment: REDEPLOY 2026-06-02 with real EIP-712 signed receipts (relayable) + risk-adjusted high-water-mark reputation, on top of the post-Phase-3/4 set (must-fixes #2/#3/#6/#7 + AdapterRegistry + circuit-breaker/withdrawPool + rotatable arbiter). All Mantlescan-verified via Etherscan V2. Sepolia uses a generic MockERC20 as the index asset (real USDY/mETH live on mainnet only - see mainnetReferences). Full on-chain parity: identity + index(rINDEX) + AdapterRegistry + 5 reputation-weighted vaults + MockYieldAdapter (live time-growing NAV on agent 1) + ReputationBond (bond-gate active) + Seasons (season 0 open) — see seeded.*. A receipt loop (agents/scripts/receipt_tick.py, cron) keeps receipts fresh. UNAUDITED. Prior instances: 0x94ea17aEA0415c86d16c85D788803917BA7E3C60 (2026-06-01), 0x9071f05834123ed4F71Ce342f1Af8e0a7077215E (pre-fix).

tradeableIndex.name: Reef AI Yield Index
tradeableIndex.note: The AgentIndex itself is the ERC-20 rINDEX (transfer/approve/transferFrom over index shares). Same address as reef.AgentIndex.

yieldAdapter.note: MockYieldAdapter (testnet, linear-accruing) wired into agent 1's vault 2026-06-02; ~half the vault's idle deployed, so its per-share NAV grows on-chain and (with the receipt loop) sets new high-water marks → rising risk-adjusted reputation. Mantlescan-verified.

reputationBond.note: Rotatable arbiter (transferArbiter/acceptArbiter). All 5 indexed agents bonded 50e18; index bond-gate ACTIVE via setReputationBond(bond, 10e18). Mantlescan-verified.

seasons.note: On-chain Human-vs-AI Seasons. Season 0 open (7-day); all 5 agents enrolled (even agentId=AI, odd=Human), entry reputation snapshotted. Mantlescan-verified.

mainnetReferences.comment: Verified addresses on Mantle MAINNET (chain 5000), pinned here for mainnet demo deployment only. Sepolia uses mocks. FBTC/USDe/MI4 added 2026-06-01 for the FbtcAdapter/UsdeAdapter/Mi4Adapter (on-chain-verified: symbol+decimals read from chain 5000).

dex.name: FusionX V2
dex._comment: Mantle-native Uniswap-V2 DEX on Sepolia (chain 5003). Addresses RPC-verified on-chain 2026-06-03 (FusionX docs labels are swapped — these are the real ones). A real MNT->USDC swap was executed (tx 0xd90ed8d2...). Used for live AI agent execution.
